all.critique:

1. Core Methods and Initialization  
• The analysis covers the essential components (DataLoader construction, loss function, SGD optimizer, and learning rate scheduler) and both major methods (__init__ and train()). This part is complete and correct, so no high‐severity issues appear here.

2. Device Management  
• The analysis mentions “optionally, move the model and data to the appropriate device,” implying that device handling might be sk
